mapper.sql: t.id, t.create_user, t.create_time, t.update_user, t.update_time, t.app_id, t.app_key, t.app_secret, t.total_tokens, t.used_tokens, t.surplus_tokens, t.status, t.model, t.remark, t.deleted

t.id, t.create_user, t.create_time, t.update_user, t.update_time, t.app_id, t.app_key, t.app_secret, t.total_tokens, t.used_tokens, t.surplus_tokens, t.status, t.model, t.remark, t.deleted, (select gm.name from gpt_model gm where gm.model = t.model and gm.deleted = 0 order by gm.sort desc, gm.id desc limit 1) as model_name
mapper.select: select from gpt_openkey t where t.model = #{model} and t.status = 1 and t.deleted = 0
